title: Department Manager Vacancy at Burger King India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
company: Burger King India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Burger King India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Burger King India South Asia Partners in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Burger King India South Asia Partners:
Burger King India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Burger King India South Asia Partners!
